// Generated by bpmn-to-code
package types

type BpmnTimer struct {
	Type       string
	TimerValue string
}

type BpmnError struct {
	Name string
	Code string
}

type BpmnEscalation struct {
	Name string
	Code string
}

type BpmnFlow struct {
	Id        string
	SourceRef string
	TargetRef string
	Condition string
	IsDefault bool
}

type BpmnRelations struct {
	Incoming         []string
	Outgoing         []string
	ParentId         string
	AttachedToRef    string
	AttachedElements []string
}
